user.title: Sign in to Mixergy
user.description: Enter your Mixergy cloud account credentials. These are the same details you use to log in to the Mixergy app.

tank.title: Find your tank
tank.description: Enter the serial number printed on the label of your Mixergy tank. It is usually 6–8 characters (e.g. `A12345`).

data_description.serial_number: Found on the white label on the side of your tank.

experience.title: Choose your experience
experience.description:
Your **{model}** (serial: `{serial}`) is connected!

Choose how you want to interact with the integration. You can change this any time from the **Configure** button on the integration card.

---

### 🟢 Simple
Best for everyday users who just want to monitor their tank and quickly boost hot water when needed.

✅ Live temperatures & charge level
✅ Heating status & heat source indicators
✅ Energy usage (kWh) for the Energy Dashboard
✅ Holiday mode status
✅ **Hot water boost** — set your target charge with a slider

❌ No settings editing
❌ No heat source switching
❌ No holiday scheduling

---

### ⚙️ Advanced
Best for power users who want complete control over their tank.

✅ Everything in Simple
✅ Adjust target temperature and cleansing temperature
✅ Switch default heat source (electric / indirect / heat pump)
✅ PV divert controls (if fitted)
✅ Frost protection & DSR switches
✅ Holiday mode scheduling
✅ Full service automation support

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Mixergy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Mixergy credentials are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials for tank `{serial_number}`.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Mixergy API. Please check your internet connection.
error.tank_not_found: No tank found with the specified serial number. Double-check the label on your tank.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.title: Mixergy settings
init.description:
**Simple** gives you live monitoring and a hot water boost slider.
**Advanced** unlocks all settings, heat source control, PV divert, holiday scheduling, and more.

data_description.experience_mode: Switch between Simple (monitoring + boost) and Advanced (full control). The integration will reload when saved.
data_description.update_interval: How frequently to fetch data from the Mixergy API (10–300 seconds).

auth_failed.message: Mixergy authentication failed. Please re-enter your credentials.

set_holiday_dates.name: Set holiday dates
set_holiday_dates.description: Set the holiday start and end dates for the Mixergy tank.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The departure date and time for holiday mode.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: The return date and time from holiday mode.

clear_holiday_dates.name: Clear holiday dates
clear_holiday_dates.description: Clear the holiday mode dates for the Mixergy tank.

boost_charge.name: Boost hot water
boost_charge.description: Boost the hot water to 100% charge immediately.
